rules.reason: the forum is public read; anyone can browse categories, no row_filter needed since every category is visible
the forum is public read; anyone can read topics, no row_filter needed since every topic is visible
the forum is public read; anyone can read replies, no row_filter needed since every reply is visible

signed-in users manage the categories they created. v1 = author manages their own; cross-user moderation (e.g. an admin/moderator retiring someone else's category) needs a moderator-role rule, deferred -- see dbbasic-package.json

signed-in users manage the topics they authored, including their own pin/lock/solved flags. v1 = author manages their own; cross-user moderation (an admin/moderator pinning, locking, or marking someone else's topic solved) needs a moderator-role rule, deferred -- see dbbasic-package.json

signed-in users manage the replies they authored, including marking their own reply as the solution. v1 = author manages their own; a topic owner marking someone else's reply as the solution needs a moderator-role rule, deferred -- see dbbasic-package.json
the forum landing page is public; visitors see categories and recent topics
